info.name: SeatSecure API — Auth
info.description:
Complete auth flow for User, Theatre Owner (dedicated model), and Admin.

**Setup**
1. Import this collection.
2. Import the `SeatSecure Environment` alongside it.
3. Run requests in the order shown — scripts auto-fill tokens and IDs.

**Auth Architecture (v2)**
- `POST /auth/*` — Regular users (User model)
- `POST /theatre-owner/*` — Theatre owners (TheatreOwner model, separate collection)
- `GET|PATCH /admin/*` — Admin only (User model, role: admin)

**Theatre Owner Flow**
```
POST /theatre-owner/register  →  accountStatus: pending (no tokens)
   ↓ admin reviews
PATCH /admin/theatre-owners/:id/approve
   ↓
POST /theatre-owner/login  →  tokens issued
   ↓
GET|PATCH /theatre-owner/profile
```

**⚠️ Before testing Admin routes**
Run the seed script to create the first admin account:
```
ADMIN_EMAIL=admin@seatsecure.com ADMIN_PASSWORD=Admin@123 ADMIN_NAME="System Admin" node scripts/seed-admin.js
```

exec: console.log('⚠️ All sessions terminated. Re-login to get new tokens.');
console.log('✅ Logged out, refresh token cleared');

item.name: 🎭 Theatre Owner
item.description:
All theatre owner auth lives at /theatre-owner/* (dedicated TheatreOwner collection, separate from User).

Flow:
1. Register → accountStatus: pending, no tokens
2. Admin approves via PATCH /admin/theatre-owners/:id/approve
3. Login → tokens issued
4. Use ownerToken for profile endpoints

exec: pm.test('No tokens issued for pending owner', () => {
console.log('✅ Pending owner ID saved:', id);
